project.name: Komga Reader
project.description: Native E-Ink-first Android comic/manga/webtoon/e-book reader for Onyx Boox; source-agnostic, device-agnostic and modular behind two architectural seams.

nodes.name: build.gradle.kts
nodes.summary: Gradle build script for the :app module: Android application config (SDK levels, signing, debug applicationId suffix, JNI packaging) and the full multi-module + Compose/Hilt/Coil/comic-cutter dependency graph.
nodes.languageNotes: Sources test credentials and release keystore from gitignored local.properties/keystore.properties, falling back gracefully when absent.

nodes.name: CiSourceStack.kt
nodes.summary: Test harness that builds an isolated source-agnostic stack (in-memory Room, unique keystore alias, wired ActiveSource + CollectionSyncManager) for CI seam tests, mirroring the production wiring.

nodes.name: TestDataModule.kt
nodes.summary: Hilt test module that replaces DataModule with an in-memory AppDatabase and per-run keystore alias, re-providing all repository, plugin-repo, and update bindings for isolated UI/CI tests.

nodes.name: CollectionSyncLiveTest.kt
nodes.summary: E2E instrumented test proving bidirectional collection sync (discovery, push/pull with last-write-wins, disconnect/reconnect) against a local test Komga via a wired CollectionSyncManager and ActiveSource.

nodes.name: LocalCoverRendererInstrumentedTest.kt
nodes.summary: Instrumented test verifying renderFirstPageCover renders a real PDF first page to valid PNG cover bytes via MuPDF on-device.

nodes.name: DownloadInstrumentedTest.kt
nodes.summary: Instrumented test exercising the download/offline path: fetch book bytes from Komga, store via DownloadManager, read back, render offline with MuPDF, then delete and verify cleanup.

nodes.name: EpubReaderInstrumentedTest.kt
nodes.summary: Instrumented test that downloads an EPUB from Komga and verifies MuPDF renders a non-empty first page.

nodes.name: LibraryFlowInstrumentedTest.kt
nodes.summary: Instrumented test that persists a Komga server config and browses it, asserting the expected series titles load from the local test Komga.

nodes.name: LocalTestServer.kt
nodes.summary: Test helper providing a dev-local Komga ServerConfig from BuildConfig credentials, skipping live tests via assumeTrue when no API key is configured.

nodes.name: ReaderFlowInstrumentedTest.kt
nodes.summary: Instrumented test that loads book pages from Komga, reads a page's image bytes, and round-trips read progress push/pull.

nodes.name: SetupServerTest.kt
nodes.summary: Persistence round-trip test proving a ServerConfig is encrypted into Room via KeystoreCredentialStore and decrypted back unchanged, guarding against the keystore-wipe pitfall.

nodes.name: PluginInfoModalTest.kt
nodes.summary: Compose UI test for PluginInfoModal covering both README branches (empty falls back to description, loaded renders markdown), with no network.

nodes.name: AndroidManifest.xml (debug)
nodes.summary: Debug-only manifest overlay enabling cleartext HTTP for local plugin-repo testing and registering the exported ScreenSaverPocReceiver; never present in release.

nodes.name: ScreenSaverPocReceiver.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only broadcast receiver that renders a distinctive test bitmap and installs it as the device screensaver via ScreenSaverManager, fired from adb to verify the Onyx standby path.

nodes.name: ReaderBottomSheetPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug/preview-only Compose previews demonstrating the reader bottom-sheet peek and expanded states via ReaderBottomSheetLayer.

nodes.name: AndroidManifest.xml (main)
nodes.summary: Main app manifest declaring permissions (install/delete packages, full-screen intent, query-all-packages for plugin discovery), MainActivity with launcher + VIEW open-with intent filters for book file types, and self-update receivers.

nodes.name: ApkSessionInstaller.kt
nodes.summary: Singleton that wraps the PackageInstaller session lifecycle (write APK, commit, OS dialog) shared by plugin install and app self-update, abandoning sessions on failure.

nodes.name: commit
nodes.summary: Creates a PackageInstaller session, streams the APK into it, and commits with a mutable PendingIntent; abandons the session and returns FAILED on any error.

nodes.name: ApkSessionInstaller
nodes.summary: Injectable singleton owning the shared APK install session mechanics for both plugin install and app self-update.

nodes.name: AppUpdateController.kt
nodes.summary: Process-wide singleton holding app self-update state: compares the installed version against the latest GitHub release, builds the multi-version-aware Available state with a combined changelog, and surfaces post-update release notes once.

nodes.name: AppUpdateController
nodes.summary: Injectable singleton exposing update StateFlow and release-notes StateFlow; checks the latest release, computes how many versions behind, and detects fresh-install version bumps.

nodes.name: AppUpdateInstaller.kt
nodes.summary: Downloads the release APK and commits the install via the shared ApkSessionInstaller, gating on the user's install-unknown-apps permission and opening settings when it is missing.

nodes.name: AppUpdateInstaller
nodes.summary: Singleton that downloads the release APK, checks the install-packages permission, and delegates the commit to ApkSessionInstaller, mapping the outcome to an UpdateInstall result.

nodes.name: AppUpdateState.kt
nodes.summary: Sealed interface modelling the app self-update check states (Idle/Checking/UpToDate/Unknown/Available) plus a hasUpdate extension; Available carries the pending count and combined changelog.

nodes.name: SourceCoverFetcher.kt
nodes.summary: Coil-2 Fetcher that resolves a SourceCover to bytes through the source seam (BrowsableSource.coverBytes), falling back to app-side first-page rendering for renderer-free local PDF/EPUB/CBR works.

nodes.name: loadCoverBytes
nodes.summary: Resolves the source from SourceManager and returns its cover bytes for the given SourceCover, keeping cover loading source-agnostic.

nodes.name: SourceCoverFetcher
nodes.summary: Coil Fetcher (with nested Factory) that loads a SourceCover via the source seam and falls back to LocalCoverRenderer when the source yields no bytes.

nodes.name: ContentTypeDetector.kt
nodes.summary: Imperative shell for content-type auto-detection: samples a few interior pages through the source seam, measures grayscale fraction and aspect via pure domain helpers, and persists the SuggestContentType verdict idempotently.

nodes.name: ContentTypeDetector
nodes.summary: Singleton that decodes downsampled sample pages, runs SuggestContentType over the measured signals, and stores the verdict keyed by source and series, skipping when a fresh-version row exists.

nodes.name: EinkContextController.kt
nodes.summary: Imperative shell for the device-managed E-Ink seam: resolves the effective refresh/color profile for the on-screen context (user override over device default) and applies it via EinkController; also exposes a manual full GC refresh.

nodes.name: EinkContextController
nodes.summary: Singleton that applies the resolved E-Ink profile per context through EinkController and triggers a user-requested full refresh.

nodes.name: ExternalBookOpener.kt
nodes.summary: Wires an externally-opened book file (VIEW intent content URI) into the reader by inserting a transient download row under SourceId.EXTERNAL, supports importing a copy into the local folder, and purges transient rows.

nodes.name: ExternalBookOpener
nodes.summary: Singleton that detects book format, registers a transient EXTERNAL download row and reader route, copies the file into the SAF folder, and purges transient rows.

nodes.name: LocalCoverRenderer.kt
nodes.summary: On-demand fallback that produces covers for LOCAL PDF/EPUB/CBR works the renderer-free :source-local cannot, delegating to LocalCoverStore; also exposes renderFirstPageCover, the pure MuPDF render glue.

nodes.name: LocalCoverRenderer
nodes.summary: Singleton that locates the downloaded book backing a local SourceCover and returns its precomputed/rendered cover via LocalCoverStore, or null for non-local/CBZ works.

nodes.name: renderFirstPageCover
nodes.summary: Pure render glue: opens bytes with a DocumentFactory and renders page 0 to PNG cover bytes, returning null for empty documents or rasters.

nodes.name: LocalCoverStore.kt
nodes.summary: Persistent precomputed cover store for LOCAL PDF/CBR works: renders page 0 once via MuPDF, caches to filesDir keyed by file signature, with a bounded background prewarm-and-prune pass and on-demand fallback.

nodes.name: LocalCoverStore
nodes.summary: Singleton owning the render-and-cache logic for local PDF/CBR covers, gating concurrent MuPDF renders with a semaphore and pruning stale signature-keyed cache files.

nodes.name: coverCacheKey
nodes.summary: Pure helper producing a stable SHA-256 cache key from a book id folded with its file signature.

nodes.name: coverPrunePlan
nodes.summary: Pure helper returning the set of existing cache files no longer current and eligible for deletion.

nodes.name: .gitlab-ci.yml
nodes.summary: GitLab CI pipeline for the Komga-Reader integration-test suite with three stages: build (assembleDebug + androidTest APK), unit (gradle test), and integration (boots Komga fixtures + a headless KVM emulator and runs connectedDebugAndroidTest for the com.komgareader.app.ci package).
nodes.languageNotes: The integration stage requires a shell-executor runner with Docker + /dev/kvm + Android SDK (tag android-kvm), using before_script/after_script for fixture and emulator lifecycle.

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: Build job that assembles the debug APK and the debug androidTest APK via Gradle, exporting them as one-day artifacts for the integration stage.

nodes.name: unit
nodes.summary: Unit-test job running the full Gradle `test` task and archiving the HTML test reports for one week.

nodes.name: integration
nodes.summary: Integration job that brings up Komga fixtures and a headless KVM emulator, runs the instrumented com.komgareader.app.ci test package via connectedDebugAndroidTest, then tears the environment back down.

nodes.name: CiFixtures.kt
nodes.summary: Holds the expected CI-Komga fixture contents (series names, novel lists, per-instance series totals) as on-device constants mirroring tools/ci-fixtures/manifest.json for assertions in seam tests.

nodes.name: CiFixtures
nodes.summary: Singleton object exposing expected fixture series names and counts (Sample-Manga, Sample-Webtoon, novels, per-instance series totals) used as the SSOT mirror for CI seam-test assertions.

nodes.name: CiKomga.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the static CI-Komga test topology as ServerConfig instances (komga-a/b/c plus an OPDS view of A) pointing at 10.0.2.2 ports with Basic-Auth admin credentials so tests are deterministic and key-independent.

nodes.name: CiKomga
nodes.summary: Singleton object that builds ServerConfig values for the three Komga CI instances (A/B/C) and an OPDS view of A, using a private komga() factory and static Basic-Auth fixture admin credentials.

nodes.name: BlockAConnectionTest.kt
nodes.summary: Spec §9 Block A seam tests for connection and multi-source behaviour: one source browsable, two distinct servers aggregated with correct per-work sourceId, identical-config dedup, mirror-server distinct IDs, and server removal not breaking the library.

nodes.name: BlockAConnectionTest
nodes.summary: AndroidJUnit4 test class exercising Naht-A connection/multi-source invariants live against the CI-Komga instances via a CiSourceStack (aggregation, sourceId-per-work, dedup, mirror, removal).

nodes.name: a2_zwei_unterschiedliche_server_aggregiert
nodes.summary: Verifies that registering two distinct servers aggregates both via all(), assigns distinct sourceIds, and that each browsed series carries the sourceId of its own source rather than the first/active one.

nodes.name: BlockAMixedSourcesTest.kt
nodes.summary: Spec §9 Block A test proving mixed source kinds live (Komga-REST + OPDS against the same CI instance) are both aggregated and browsable with distinct IDs, including an agnostic litmus over BrowsableSource.

nodes.name: BlockAMixedSourcesTest
nodes.summary: AndroidJUnit4 test class registering Komga-REST and OPDS simultaneously and asserting agnostic browsing over BrowsableSource works for both kinds without source-specific code paths.

nodes.name: BlockBResolutionTest.kt
nodes.summary: Spec §9 Block B tests for per-work resolution via get(sourceId) (not current()) under multiple active sources, and that page/cover bytes flow through the openPage/coverBytes seam rather than a direct URL/auth path.

nodes.name: BlockBResolutionTest
nodes.summary: AndroidJUnit4 test class asserting that a second source's work resolves through get(sourceId) and that page/cover bytes are obtained through the BrowsableSource seam.

nodes.name: BlockCViewerDispatchTest.kt
nodes.summary: Spec §9 Block C tests for deterministic reader dispatch on real fixture metadata: manga (CBZ) → manga viewer, webtoon → webtoon viewer, EPUB → novel viewer (format wins), and contentTypeOverride beating the shelf fallback via ResolveViewerType.

nodes.name: BlockCViewerDispatchTest
nodes.summary: AndroidJUnit4 test class verifying the deterministic 6-step ViewerType resolution rule against live fixtures using ResolveViewerType (manga/webtoon/novel dispatch and override precedence).

nodes.name: BlockDCollectionSyncTest.kt
nodes.summary: Spec §9 Block D multi-source collection-sync tests over the A+B CI topology: a cross-source collection syncs each member subset to its own source, and removeSource keeps the other source's members locally while deleting nothing on the server.

nodes.name: BlockDCollectionSyncTest
nodes.summary: AndroidJUnit4 test class exercising multi-source collection sync via CollectionSyncManager.fullSync and removeSource, including cross-source subset routing and disconnect-is-local-only invariants.

nodes.name: d15_cross_source_collection_synct_je_subset_zur_eigenen_quelle
nodes.summary: Creates a local collection with members from servers A and B, runs fullSync, and asserts each server receives only its own subset (A the manga member, B the webtoon member) under the same collection name.

nodes.name: d16_remove_source_behaelt_andere_quelle_und_loescht_nichts_am_server
nodes.summary: Syncs a cross-source collection then calls removeSource(A) and asserts A's members are removed locally while B's remain, and that the collection is not deleted on server A (disconnect is local-only).

nodes.name: BlockEProgressRoundTripTest.kt
nodes.summary: Spec §9 Block E test proving read progress survives a local wipe via server pull: device 1 pushes a known mid-book page, then a fresh local DB (device 2) pulls exactly that page back from the server.

nodes.name: BlockEProgressRoundTripTest
nodes.summary: AndroidJUnit4 test class proving server-side progress persistence by pushing from one CiSourceStack and pulling from a second fresh stack against the same Komga account.

nodes.name: fortschritt_ueberlebt_lokalen_wipe_via_server_pull
nodes.summary: Pushes a non-default mid-book page on a first device, closes it, then on a fresh second device pulls the same page from the server to prove progress persists server-side across a local wipe.

nodes.name: BlockEProgressSyncTest.kt
nodes.summary: Spec §9 Block E tests for offline-first read progress: the local dirty/markSynced lifecycle via RoomReadProgressRepository, live push/pull round-trip over SyncingSource, and progress routing to the correct source under two active servers.

nodes.name: BlockEProgressSyncTest
nodes.summary: AndroidJUnit4 test class covering the dirty sync-queue lifecycle plus live push/pull over SyncingSource and per-source progress isolation across two registered servers.

nodes.name: e20_progress_synct_zur_richtigen_quelle
nodes.summary: With two registered servers, pushes progress on a book belonging to B and pulls it back via the B source resolved through get(sourceId), asserting each source has its own namespace.

nodes.name: BlockFDownloadTest.kt
nodes.summary: Spec §9 Block F test for the download-then-offline-read flow: downloadFile reports progress through the seam, DownloadManager stores and re-reads the bytes, MuPDF renders the offline file, and delete removes the entry.

nodes.name: BlockFDownloadTest
nodes.summary: AndroidJUnit4 test class wiring a DownloadManager over in-memory Room repositories to prove a downloaded book is stored, re-read, rendered offline by MuPDF, and deletable.

nodes.name: f21_download_dann_offline_lesbar
nodes.summary: Downloads a manga book through the source seam with a progress callback, stores it offline, re-reads the bytes, renders the first page with MuPDF to prove offline readability, then deletes the download.

nodes.name: PluginColorPresetTest
nodes.summary: AndroidJUnit4 E2E test that PluginHost discovers an installed data-only color-preset APK and parses its ColorPresetSpecs from the asset, skipping (assumeTrue) when the preset APK is not installed.

nodes.name: PluginColorPresetTest.kt
nodes.summary: E2E test for the data-only color-preset plugin: PluginHost discovers the installed preset APK and parses its ColorPresetSpec(s); server-less, using only PackageManager and asset reading.

nodes.name: PluginKavitaCiTest.kt
nodes.summary: E2E test of the source-plugin load chain against a reproducible CI-Kavita: discovery via PackageManager, TOFU signature pinning, loading via sourceFor, then reading over the BrowsableSource seam; skips when kavitaUrl/kavitaKey instrumentation args are absent.

nodes.name: PluginKavitaCiTest
nodes.summary: AndroidJUnit4 test class proving the Kavita source-plugin discovery → TOFU → load → browse chain on-device against the CI-Kavita instance, parameterized by instrumentation arguments.

nodes.name: PluginLanguageTest.kt
nodes.summary: E2E test for the data-only language plugin: PluginHost discovers the installed LANGUAGE-category APK and parseLanguageSpec validates its code and string map; skips when the ES language APK is not installed.

nodes.name: PluginLanguageTest
nodes.summary: AndroidJUnit4 test class discovering a LANGUAGE data plugin via PluginHost.discoverDataPlugins and asserting parseLanguageSpec returns a non-empty code and string map.

nodes.name: PluginReaderPresetTest.kt
nodes.summary: E2E test for the data-only reader-preset plugin: PluginHost discovers the installed READER_PRESET APK and parseReaderPresetSpecs returns a non-empty named preset list; skips when the E-Ink reader-preset APK is not installed.

nodes.name: PluginReaderPresetTest
nodes.summary: AndroidJUnit4 test class discovering a READER_PRESET data plugin and asserting parseReaderPresetSpecs yields at least one named preset.

nodes.name: BlockAServerUiTest.kt
nodes.summary: Spec §9 Block A Compose UI test that adds a server through the real add-server flow (filling fields and saving) to see the live library, and removes a preconfigured server to fall back to the empty state.

nodes.name: BlockAServerUiTest
nodes.summary: Hilt Compose UI test class driving the real settings → connection add/remove flow against CI-Komga-A and asserting the live library and empty state via visible German texts.

nodes.name: BlockCReaderDispatchUiTest.kt
nodes.summary: Spec §9 Block B/C Compose UI test navigating library → series → reader and asserting deterministic reader dispatch: manga (CBZ) opens the paged reader, novel (EPUB) opens the novel reader.

nodes.name: BlockCReaderDispatchUiTest
nodes.summary: Hilt Compose UI test class opening the first book of a seeded series and asserting the correct reader root testTag (reader_paged for manga, reader_novel for EPUB).

nodes.name: BlockDCollectionUiTest.kt
nodes.summary: Spec §9 Block D Compose UI test that creates a collection through the UI (D14, create-only) and asserts it appears in the collections list.

nodes.name: BlockDCollectionUiTest
nodes.summary: Hilt Compose UI test class creating a new collection via the collections tab UI and waiting for it to appear in the list.

nodes.name: HiltUiSmokeTest.kt
nodes.summary: Smoke test proving the UI test infrastructure end-to-end: Hilt in-memory DB, pre-launch seeding of a CI server, real MainActivity Compose UI, and the live library rendering the seeded Manga series.

nodes.name: HiltUiSmokeTest
nodes.summary: Hilt Compose smoke test class that seeds a CI server before launching MainActivity and asserts the live library shows the Manga fixture series.

nodes.name: PluginTabUiTest.kt
nodes.summary: UI test proving the installed Kavita source plugin appears in the Plugins tab via the real PluginHost from AppModule; server-less, skipping when the Kavita plugin APK is not installed.

nodes.name: PluginTabUiTest
nodes.summary: Hilt Compose UI test class that navigates to the Plugins tab and asserts the installed Kavita plugin row is displayed.

nodes.name: UiTestBase.kt
nodes.summary: Abstract base for Compose UI integration tests providing the Hilt rule, an empty compose rule, server seeding before activity start, and a manual MainActivity launch helper.

nodes.name: UiTestBase
nodes.summary: Abstract test base class exposing HiltAndroidRule, createEmptyComposeRule, an injected ServerRepository, and inject/seedServers/launch helpers used by all CI Compose UI tests.

nodes.name: HiltTestRunner.kt
nodes.summary: Custom AndroidJUnitRunner that swaps the app Application for HiltTestApplication so @TestInstallIn modules (e.g. in-memory DB) take effect in instrumented tests.

nodes.name: HiltTestRunner
nodes.summary: Subclasses AndroidJUnitRunner to instantiate HiltTestApplication, enabling Hilt test modules; referenced as testInstrumentationRunner in the Gradle build.

nodes.name: KavitaPluginLiveTest.kt
nodes.summary: On-device E2E proof of the Phase-4 plugin loader against a live Docker Kavita: discovery, ABI gate, TOFU signature pinning, classloading, and reading content through the BrowsableSource seam.
nodes.languageNotes: Exercises PluginHost discovery and TOFU certificate pinning, including a negative test for a wrong signature pin.

nodes.name: KavitaPluginLiveTest
nodes.summary: Test class proving the full Kavita plugin chain (discovery, ABI, signature pin, load, browse/books/pages/openPage) plus a TOFU negative case where a wrong pin blocks loading.

nodes.name: kavita_plugin_entdeckt_geladen_und_liefert_inhalt
nodes.summary: Discovers the Kavita plugin, validates ABI/metadata/config schema, instantiates it via signature pin, and reads a seeded series down to real image bytes through the source seam.

nodes.name: falscher_signatur_pin_blockiert_das_laden
nodes.summary: Negative TOFU test asserting that a deliberately wrong certificate pin causes the plugin host to refuse loading the source.

nodes.name: MultiServerPersistenceTest.kt
nodes.summary: Instrumented test verifying multi-source persistence on real Room with AES/GCM keystore: multiple mixed Komga+OPDS server configs each get a distinct rowid with decrypted credentials.
nodes.languageNotes: Also proves the ServerEntity.id Int-to-Long change opens an existing v13 DB without a destructive wipe.

nodes.name: MultiServerPersistenceTest
nodes.summary: Test class saving three mixed server configs (two Komga, one OPDS), asserting distinct ids, decrypted credentials, correct source kinds, and single-removal behavior.

nodes.name: mehrere_server_persistieren_gemischt
nodes.summary: Persists multiple mixed Komga/OPDS server configs through the Room server repository and keystore, asserting unique rowids, decrypted API keys, source kinds, and removal.

nodes.name: NovelRelayoutBitmapTest.kt
nodes.summary: Focused regression test for a recycled-bitmap crash: proves the novel reader's relayout clears its render cache without recycling a still-displayed bitmap.
nodes.languageNotes: Replicates the cache-clear operation in isolation using a Mutex-guarded map rather than instantiating the full ViewModel.

nodes.name: NovelRelayoutBitmapTest
nodes.summary: Regression test class asserting that clearing the render cache (instead of recycling) leaves a handed-out, still-displayed bitmap alive to avoid a Compose crash.

nodes.name: OpdsCanaryInstrumentedTest.kt
nodes.summary: Source-agnostic canary test that browses and reads through an OPDS source against a MockWebServer with no Komga code in the path, rendering the downloaded CBZ via MuPDF.
nodes.languageNotes: Builds a minimal valid CBZ (ZIP containing a PNG) in-memory and serves an OPDS Atom catalog via MockWebServer.

nodes.name: OpdsCanaryInstrumentedTest
nodes.summary: Test class proving the source seam holds for OPDS: browse and download via SourceManager/BrowsableSource only, render via MuPDF, with a MockWebServer backend.

nodes.name: cbzWithOnePage
nodes.summary: Builds a minimal valid CBZ byte array (a ZIP wrapping one PNG) that MuPDF can open as a single-page document.

nodes.name: opds_browse_and_read_works_without_komga
nodes.summary: Registers an OPDS source in the SourceManager, browses its catalog, downloads the acquisition CBZ, and renders it via MuPDF, all without any Komga code.

nodes.name: DialogSlotPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only Compose preview proving the dialog slot is swappable: an AlternativeDialog renders the same DialogState surface with a different layout without touching any call site.

nodes.name: AlternativeDialog
nodes.summary: Alternative dialog renderer that arranges the shared DialogState surface with a centered title and vertically stacked actions, demonstrating the dialog region swap.

nodes.name: TileSlotPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only Compose preview proving the tiles slot is swappable: an alternative series-tile layout (title above cover) renders the same TileState surface without changing call sites.

nodes.name: DetailSlotPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only Compose preview proving the detail scaffold slot is swappable: an alternative detail frame with a slim title bar replaces the header slot without touching detail routes.

nodes.name: HomeHeaderSlotPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only Compose preview proving the home-header slot is swappable: an AlternativeHomeHeader rearranges the same HomeHeaderState surface (status on top, actions below) without touching tab logic.

nodes.name: AlternativeHomeHeader
nodes.summary: Alternative home-header composable arranging the HomeHeaderState status, actions, and menu in a column to demonstrate the home-header region swap.

nodes.name: IconPackPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only Compose preview proving the icon-pack seam: an AlternativeIconPack overrides only the Home glyph and falls back per-key to the default pack, with the process-global pack restored on dispose.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a DisposableEffect to restore the process-global ActiveIconPack so a rendered preview does not leak its glyph into other previews.

nodes.name: IconRaster
nodes.summary: Renders a row of AppIcons glyphs under a given IconPack, setting the process-global ActiveIconPack and restoring the default in onDispose to avoid leaking into sibling previews.

nodes.name: OverlaySlotPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only Compose preview proving the reader overlay slot is swappable: an alternative reader chrome menu bar (shortcuts left, centered title) rearranges the same ReaderOverlayState surface.

nodes.name: ReaderChromeSlotPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only Compose preview proving the whole reader-scaffold slot is swappable: a minimal alternative reader frame rearranges the same ReaderScaffoldState surface, omitting footer and hints.

nodes.name: SettingsSlotPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only Compose preview proving the settings slot is swappable: a flat single-scroll list of sections rearranges the same SettingsState surface without touching call sites.

nodes.name: DeclarativeShellPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only Compose preview proving the declarative shell pack: the same AppShellState renders as either a drawer or bottom-bar skeleton driven solely by the ShellDescriptor nav style.

nodes.name: FloatingNavShellPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only Compose preview rendering the FloatingNavBar with the Aurora look (cobalt accent, elevation, rounded pill) for the modern-mobile LCD shell.

nodes.name: HeaderSlotPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only Compose preview proving the header slot seam: a CenteredHeaderPack activates via KomgaReaderTheme(slotPack=...) so the unchanged call site renders a centered header, plus a search-active state preview.

nodes.name: AuroraPackPreview.kt
nodes.summary: Debug-only Compose preview rendering the AuroraPack theme (color scheme, shapes, typography) in light and dark variants.

nodes.name: Bitter-OFL.txt
nodes.summary: SIL Open Font License (v1.1) text for the bundled Bitter Pro font, including the copyright attribution and full license terms.

nodes.name: Literata-OFL.txt
nodes.summary: SIL Open Font License (OFL 1.1) text for the bundled Literata font used in the EPUB/novel reflow reader.

nodes.name: hyph-de-1996.pattern
nodes.summary: German (1996 reform orthography) TeX-style hyphenation pattern dictionary consumed by the crengine reflow engine for justified line-breaking in the novel reader.
nodes.languageNotes: TeX/Liang hyphenation patterns: numeric digits between letters encode allowed/forbidden break points; ~35k entries make this a large generated data asset, not hand-edited code.

nodes.name: hyph-en-us.pattern
nodes.summary: US-English TeX-style hyphenation pattern dictionary consumed by the crengine reflow engine for justified line-breaking in the novel reader.
nodes.languageNotes: TeX/Liang hyphenation patterns (~5k entries); a generated data asset paired with the German pattern file for per-language word-breaking.

nodes.name: ColorPipelineTransformation.kt
nodes.summary: Coil image Transformation that applies the full E-Ink color pixel pipeline (saturation/contrast/gamma/dither) to decoded reader page bitmaps, with a profile-derived cache key so results are cached per image and profile.
nodes.languageNotes: Coil Transformation contract: cacheKey encodes all ColorProfile fields so equal profiles share cache entries; only attached to page requests, never covers.

nodes.name: ColorPipelineTransformation
nodes.summary: Coil Transformation that copies the bitmap to ARGB_8888, runs the domain applyPixelPipeline over its pixels for the given ColorProfile, and writes them back.

nodes.name: ActiveSource.kt
nodes.summary: The source-agnostic boundary for ViewModels: resolves configured connections as BrowsableSource/CollectionSyncSource by sourceId (or aggregated), never exposing concrete source types, enforcing the Seam A integration rule.
nodes.languageNotes: Open class so unit tests can supply a fixed source without a network-bound implementation; all source resolution flows through registration.sync over the configured servers.

nodes.name: ActiveSource
nodes.summary: Singleton resolver exposing get(sourceId), all(), current(), collectionSource(), and allCollectionSources() over the SourceManager registry, ensuring sources are registered before resolution.

nodes.name: SourceCover.kt
nodes.summary: Coil model data class identifying a source-loaded cover image by sourceId, remoteId, and whether it is a series vs book/chapter cover.

nodes.name: SourceImage.kt
nodes.summary: Coil model data class identifying a source-loaded page image by sourceId, book remote id, and 1-based page number.

nodes.name: SourcePageFetcher.kt
nodes.summary: Coil Fetcher (plus pure loadPageBytes helper) that resolves a SourceImage into page bytes through the source seam via BrowsableSource.openPage, avoiding source-specific URLs and auth headers in UI code.

nodes.name: loadPageBytes
nodes.summary: Pure, testable helper that resolves the source from SourceManager and calls BrowsableSource.openPage with a PageRef to return page image bytes.

nodes.name: SourcePageFetcher
nodes.summary: Coil Fetcher (with nested Factory) that wraps loadPageBytes output into a Coil SourceResult for a SourceImage model.

nodes.name: CollectionSyncManager.kt

nodes.name: CollectionDao.kt

nodes.name: CollectionEntities.kt

nodes.summary: Room DAO for user-added plugin repository URLs, supporting reactive and one-shot listing, insert (ignore on conflict), rename by url, and delete by id.

nodes.summary: Room DAO for per-book paged reading progress, exposing reactive observation, get by id, the dirty backlog for sync, put, and mark-clean.

nodes.name: SeriesOverrideDao.kt
nodes.summary: Room DAO for manual per-series content-type overrides, keyed source-agnostically by sourceId and series remote id.

nodes.summary: Room DAO for configured server connections, observing all rows, saving (replace), querying the max rowid for id assignment, and deleting individual or all servers.

nodes.name: SettingsDao.kt
nodes.summary: Room DAO for the key-value settings table, with reactive observation of a value by key, upsert, and delete.

nodes.name: ShelfDao.kt
nodes.summary: Room DAO for user-defined shelves (app libraries), with reactive observation, insert (replace), and delete by id.

nodes.name: DownloadManager.kt
nodes.summary: Android-bound manager that stores downloaded book bytes either into a SAF tree URI or internal storage, records the download in the DB, and reads/deletes local book bytes via the slim LocalBookBytes abstraction.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Android SAF DocumentFile + ContentResolver with a filesDir fallback; IO wrapped in withContext(Dispatchers.IO). LocalBookBytes interface decouples consumers from the Android-bound implementation (DIP).

nodes.name: ColorPresetImporter.kt
nodes.summary: Pure converter from a plugin ColorPresetSpec into a domain ColorProfile, ABI-gating and finite-value-validating the spec and clamping values to ColorProfile ranges.

nodes.name: LanguageSpecParser.kt
nodes.summary: Pure org.json parser turning a language plugin's JSON payload into a LanguageSpec (code/name/abi/strings), skipping non-string string entries and inheriting the manifest ABI when absent.

nodes.name: PluginRepoDefaults.kt
nodes.summary: Constants object holding the official plugin repository name and its GitHub-raw repo.json URL, kept as a constant rather than a DB seed for trivial swapping.

nodes.name: RepoStore.kt
nodes.summary: Manages active plugin repo sources, reactively combining the toggleable official repo constant with user-added repos from the DAO and exposing add/remove/rename/toggle operations.

nodes.name: UiPackParser.kt
nodes.summary: Pure org.json parser for a UI-pack plugin's ui_pack.json into a domain UiPackSpec, ABI-gating then tolerantly extracting shell navStyle, icon remaps, and a full theme spec (8 color roles, corner radius, typography) with sentinel-guarded numeric parsing.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Int.MIN_VALUE/isFinite sentinels to distinguish missing/unparseable numbers from a genuine zero, avoiding silent org.json coercion bugs.

nodes.name: RoomCollectionRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed implementation of the domain CollectionRepository, mapping entities to domain models, atomically replacing members, maintaining per-source sync links, and cleaning up collections when a source is removed.
nodes.languageNotes: Combines two Flows (collections + members) into reactive UserCollection lists; removeSource only deletes collections left fully empty after clearing a source's members/links.

nodes.name: DownloadManager
nodes.summary: Hilt singleton that persists downloaded book bytes to SAF or internal storage, records them in the download repository, and reads/deletes local bytes, implementing LocalBookBytes.

nodes.name: store
nodes.summary: Suspend function that writes book bytes to the configured location and records the resulting download (path, format, metadata) in the download repository.

nodes.name: storeBytes
nodes.summary: Writes bytes either into a SAF tree URI via DocumentFile (overwriting any existing file) or falls back to internal app storage, returning the resulting local path/URI.

nodes.name: RoomCollectionRepository
nodes.summary: CollectionRepository implementation over CollectionDao that maps Room entities to domain collection models, manages ordered members and per-source sync links, and prunes collections emptied by source removal.

nodes.name: setMembers
nodes.summary: Atomically replaces a collection's ordered members and upserts a dirty sync link for each distinct source involved, marking it for a later server push.

nodes.name: removeSource
nodes.summary: Clears a source's collection members and sync links, then deletes only those touched collections that have become completely empty.

nodes.name: ColorPresetImporter
nodes.summary: Pure object converting a plugin ColorPresetSpec to a domain ColorProfile, with an ABI/finite-value-gating toProfileOrNull and a clamping toProfile.

nodes.name: parseLanguageSpec
nodes.summary: Parses a single language JSON object into a LanguageSpec, returning null on malformed input or missing code/name/strings and inheriting the manifest ABI when absent.

nodes.name: parseUiPackSpec
nodes.summary: ABI-gated pure parser of a UI-pack ui_pack.json into a UiPackSpec, extracting optional shell navStyle, icon remap map, and a full theme spec with sentinel-guarded corner radius, typography, and 8 color roles for light/dark.

nodes.name: RepoStore

nodes.name: RoomNovelProgressRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed NovelProgressRepository tracking EPUB/novel reading position (anchor + fraction) per source and book, with dirty flags for offline-first sync.

nodes.summary: Persists novel reading progress via a NovelProgressDao, coercing the fraction into [0,1], stamping updatedAt, and exposing dirty entries for the sync queue.

nodes.name: RoomReadProgressRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed ReadProgressRepository for paged/comic reading progress, merging page numbers without regress and marking entries dirty for the offline-first sync queue.

nodes.summary: Implements ReadProgressRepository, taking the max of new and stored page to avoid regress, OR-ing the completed flag, and exposing dirty entries to sync.

nodes.name: RoomSeriesOverrideRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed SeriesOverrideRepository storing per-series content-type overrides as enum names, used by the deterministic viewer-type resolution.

nodes.name: RoomServerRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed ServerRepository persisting multiple mixed server connections (Komga/OPDS/plugin) with AES/GCM-encrypted credential and extras blobs that survive app updates.
nodes.languageNotes: Credentials and the extras map are Keystore-encrypted as ciphertext/IV blob columns; the extras Map<String,String> is JSON-serialized before encryption.

nodes.name: RoomServerRepository
nodes.summary: Implements ServerRepository for N simultaneous server configs, encrypting apiKey/password/extras via KeystoreCredentialStore and decrypting them back on read with safe fallbacks.

nodes.name: RoomShelfRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed ShelfRepository for library shelves, encoding multi-source ShelfSource lists into a flat string column and decoding the default content type back to an enum.

nodes.name: RoomShelfRepository
nodes.summary: Implements ShelfRepository over a ShelfDao, mapping ShelfEntity rows to domain Shelf objects using ShelfSourceCodec and ContentType parsing.

nodes.name: ShelfSourceCodec
nodes.summary: Pure object encoding/decoding ShelfSource lists to and from the flat `sourceId=cid1,cid2|...` string format stored in Room.

nodes.name: CredentialStore.kt
nodes.summary: Interface defining secure storage for secrets (API keys and passwords), implemented by Keystore-backed credential stores.

nodes.name: EncryptedCredentialStore.kt
nodes.summary: CredentialStore implementation using EncryptedSharedPreferences (AES256-GCM); recovers from a corrupt keyset by recreating prefs and falls back to RAM-only storage, never writing plaintext secrets to disk.
nodes.languageNotes: Defensive open-with-retry pattern: on keyset corruption it deletes the prefs file and recreates once, then degrades to an in-memory map rather than persisting plaintext.

nodes.name: EncryptedCredentialStore
nodes.summary: Stores API key and password in EncryptedSharedPreferences with a Keystore MasterKey, with resilient open/retry and an in-memory fallback that never persists plaintext.

nodes.name: KeystoreCredentialStore.kt
nodes.summary: Encrypts/decrypts secrets with an AES/GCM AndroidKeyStore key (surviving app updates) and returns persistable CipherBlobs, used by RoomServerRepository to keep credentials across reinstalls.
nodes.languageNotes: The Keystore AES/GCM key is not bound to the APK signature, so encrypted credential blobs survive `adb install -r` / app updates; encrypt returns ciphertext+IV as Base64 CipherBlob.

nodes.name: KeystoreCredentialStore
nodes.summary: Wraps an AndroidKeyStore AES/GCM key to encrypt/decrypt strings into persistable CipherBlobs; also implements CredentialStore via an in-memory buffer since persistence runs through RoomServerRepository.

nodes.name: ColorFilterMatrix.kt
nodes.summary: Pure-Kotlin domain helper that builds a 4x5 ColorMatrix (FloatArray of 20) combining saturation, contrast, and brightness in the 0..255 range, compatible with Compose's ColorMatrix.
nodes.languageNotes: Analytically folds the saturation matrix with contrast/brightness scaling+offset into a single matrix, avoiding chained passes.

nodes.name: buildColorMatrix
nodes.summary: Computes the row-major 4x5 color matrix from Rec.709 luminance weights, applying saturation then folding contrast (pivot 127.5) and linear brightness into the scale and offset terms.

nodes.name: PixelPipeline.kt
nodes.summary: Pure-Kotlin in-place ARGB pixel-processing pipeline for the E-Ink color filter: linear saturation/contrast/brightness, levels+gamma LUT, unsharp mask, and Floyd-Steinberg or ordered dithering.
nodes.languageNotes: Operates directly on packed-ARGB IntArray with bit shifts/masks; dithering and blur kernels are written as plain loops for determinism and Android-independence.

nodes.name: buildGammaLut
nodes.summary: Builds a 256-entry gamma-correction lookup table (out = 255 * (in/255)^(1/gamma)), returning identity when gamma equals 1.

nodes.name: applyPixelPipeline
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full filter pipeline over an ARGB IntArray, skipping neutral stages and dispatching the configured dither mode based on the ColorProfile.

nodes.name: buildToneLut
nodes.summary: Builds a combined 256-entry tone LUT applying black/white-point levels stretching followed by gamma correction.

nodes.name: applyUnsharp
nodes.summary: Applies an unsharp-mask sharpen per channel (out = clamp(in + amount*(in - blur))) using a box-blur copy of the input to avoid in-place feedback.

nodes.name: boxBlur
nodes.summary: Separable box blur over a single-channel array, blurring horizontally then vertically within a configurable radius.

nodes.name: applyFloydSteinberg
nodes.summary: Applies Floyd-Steinberg error-diffusion dithering per channel, quantizing to the configured number of levels and propagating the residual to neighbouring pixels.

nodes.name: applyOrdered
nodes.summary: Applies deterministic ordered (Bayer 4x4) dithering per channel, adding a threshold offset before quantizing to the configured levels.

nodes.name: applyLinear
nodes.summary: Applies the linear saturation/contrast/brightness color matrix (from buildColorMatrix) to each packed-ARGB pixel, clamping channels to 0..255.

nodes.name: Book.kt
nodes.summary: Source-agnostic domain data model for a book/chapter, carrying sourceId, remoteId, format, page/download state, optional metadata, and server-reported read progress.
nodes.languageNotes: Kotlin data class with default values for optional metadata so each MediaSource can fill only what it has.

nodes.name: BookFormat.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the BookFormat enum distinguishing the supported book container formats in the source-agnostic domain layer.

nodes.name: ColorProfile.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the named E-Ink color-filter profile (saturation/contrast/levels/dither) applied to covers and reader pages, with neutrality flags and value-range constants serving as the single source of truth for clamping.
nodes.languageNotes: Kotlin data class with computed properties (isLinearNeutral/needsPixelPipeline/isNeutral) and a companion object holding the OFF fallback plus SSOT range constants.

nodes.name: ContentType.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the ContentType enum describing the kind of content a shelf or series holds, feeding the deterministic viewer-type resolution.

nodes.name: DisplayBehavior.kt
nodes.summary: Models device display behavior on two orthogonal axes (allowsMotion, allowsAccentColor) and derives it from the user display mode, replacing a binary isEink flag to support mono E-Ink, Kaleido, and LCD device classes.
nodes.languageNotes: Top-level function displayBehaviorFor maps DisplayMode to a DisplayBehavior; the EinkCapabilities parameter is intentionally unused after a user-verified design decision.

nodes.name: DisplayMode.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the DisplayMode enum (EINK / SMARTPHONE) representing the user-chosen device-class theme axis.

nodes.name: DitherMode.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the DitherMode enum selecting the dithering algorithm used by the color-filter pixel pipeline.

nodes.name: DownloadState.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the DownloadState enum tracking the offline-download lifecycle of a book.

nodes.name: ReadingDirection.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the ReadingDirection enum (e.g. LTR/RTL/vertical) used as source-agnostic series metadata feeding viewer-type resolution.

nodes.name: ReadProgress.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the ReadProgress value object holding a book's reading position with a dirty flag for offline-first sync and a locator for EPUB position or comic page index.

nodes.name: RemoteCollection.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the RemoteCollection server-view value object used by the pure collection-sync planner for last-write-wins reconciliation.

nodes.name: Series.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the Series value object carrying source-agnostic metadata (summary, status, genres, reading direction) and a per-series content-type override that any MediaSource fills as far as its backend allows.

nodes.name: Shelf.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the Shelf and ShelfSource value objects representing a user-defined library that bundles selected per-source containers and an optional default content type for viewer fallback.

nodes.name: ShellLayoutMode.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the ShellLayoutMode enum (AUTO/COMPACT/EXPANDED) letting the user override the form-factor-derived shell layout, orthogonal to the device-class display mode.

nodes.name: SourceKind.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the SourceKind enum identifying the backend kind of a media source (e.g. KOMGA, OPDS, PLUGIN) used by the source-registration wiring.

nodes.name: ThemeSpec.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the fully declarative theme descriptor (ThemeSpec, ColorRolesSpec, TypoSpec) for an external UI pack using only primitives, keeping domain/data free of Compose/ui-api types.
nodes.languageNotes: Three nested data classes carry only hex-string/Int/Float primitives so the spec stays pure; translation to ColorScheme/Shapes happens only in the :app module.

nodes.name: UiPackSpec.kt

nodes.name: ViewerType.kt

nodes.name: WebtoonStrip.kt

nodes.languageNotes: Precomputes a prefix-sum of chapter starts in an IntArray and clamps out-of-range indices; pure with no I/O for easy unit testing.

nodes.name: WebtoonStrip

nodes.name: jnigraphicslib.cpp
nodes.summary: Android-bitmap access layer for the crengine renderer: a JNIGraphicsLib that dlopen's libjnigraphics plus a pure-JNI JNIGraphicsReplacement fallback that locks/unlocks bitmap pixels via reflection.
nodes.languageNotes: Vendored from CoolReader/crengine-ng (GPL-3.0); two BitmapAccessor strategies — native libjnigraphics vs. a reflection-based replacement for restricted environments.

nodes.name: JNIGraphicsLib
nodes.summary: BitmapAccessor implementation that dynamically loads libjnigraphics and binds AndroidBitmap_getInfo/lockPixels/unlockPixels to lock and convert the LVDrawBuf into the bitmap.

nodes.name: JNIGraphicsReplacement
nodes.summary: Pure-JNI fallback BitmapAccessor that reads bitmap info and copies pixels via Bitmap.getPixels/createBitmap reflection when libjnigraphics is unavailable.

nodes.name: getInfo
nodes.summary: Reads width/height/stride/format from a Java Bitmap via reflective method calls, populating an AndroidBitmapInfo for the replacement accessor.

nodes.name: unlock
nodes.summary: Converts the LVDrawBuf into the int pixel array and pushes it back into the Java Bitmap via Bitmap.createBitmap reflection, completing the replacement draw.

nodes.name: jnigraphicslib.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring the BitmapAccessorInterface abstraction (lock/unlock an LVDrawBuf against a Java Bitmap, plus a getInstance factory) shared by the two accessor implementations.

nodes.name: lvcolordrawbufex.cpp
nodes.summary: Extended color draw buffer for crengine that converts an LVColorDrawBuf into an ARGB int pixel array suitable for an Android bitmap.

nodes.name: lvcolordrawbufex.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring LVColorDrawBufEx, an LVColorDrawBuf subclass exposing a convert() that yields the pixel array consumed by the bitmap accessors.

nodes.name: build.gradle.kts
nodes.summary: Gradle build script for the source-api module (Naht-A contract): pure Kotlin JVM library that re-exports :domain via api() and adds coroutines plus test dependencies.

nodes.name: CollectionSyncSource.kt
nodes.summary: Optional Naht-A capability interface for sources that can write user collections server-side (list/create/update/delete with replace semantics), gated by a canWriteCollections check.

nodes.name: MediaSource.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the Naht-A source contract: the base MediaSource interface plus BrowsableSource (browse/search/read/cover/download), SyncingSource (progress sync), and ContainerSource, with supporting value types (PageRef, PagedResult, SourceFilter, SourceContainer).
nodes.languageNotes: Source-agnostic suspend interfaces with nullable/empty return contracts so partial sources can opt out; the central abstraction the whole app reads through.

nodes.name: PageRefs.kt
nodes.summary: Single pure helper buildPageRefs that deterministically constructs 1-based PageRefs from a page count without any network call, source-neutral.

nodes.name: SourceManager.kt
nodes.summary: Reactive registry of active sources (id -> MediaSource) backed by a StateFlow; the single source-agnostic access point for library/reader/sync, with getOrStub guaranteeing a missing backend never breaks the library.

nodes.name: SourceManager
nodes.summary: Holds a MutableStateFlow map of registered sources and exposes register/unregister/get/getOrStub plus an observable sources flow, with no CoroutineScope kept inside the domain module.

nodes.name: StubSource.kt
nodes.summary: Placeholder MediaSource that holds title/ID for library entries whose real source is unavailable (remote server down, plugin uninstalled), so the library never breaks; browsing/sync deliberately fail.

nodes.name: FoundationE2ETest.kt
nodes.summary: End-to-end wiring test of the domain foundation: deterministic source ID -> SourceManager registry -> ResolveViewerType over a shelf -> ResolveProgressConflict, proving the domain building blocks compose as a pipeline.

nodes.name: BrowsableSourceContractTest.kt
nodes.summary: Contract test using a FakeBrowsable implementation to verify the BrowsableSource interface methods downloadFile, seriesIdOf, and coverBytes are satisfiable and behave through the interface.

nodes.name: PageRefsTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit tests for buildPageRefs verifying 1-based page numbers with 0-based indices and an empty result for a zero page count.

nodes.name: SourceIdTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit tests for SourceId verifying ID stability for equal inputs, distinctness for different configs, non-negativity, and the reserved local ID 0.

nodes.name: SourceManagerTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit tests for SourceManager covering get for registered/unknown sources, getOrStub returning a StubSource, and the sources StateFlow emitting after registration (verified with Turbine).

nodes.name: build.gradle.kts
nodes.summary: Gradle build script for the source-komga module: Kotlin JVM library with serialization, depending on :domain and :source-api plus Retrofit/OkHttp/kotlinx.serialization and MockWebServer for tests.

nodes.name: ApiKeyInterceptor.kt
nodes.summary: OkHttp interceptor that attaches the Komga API key as an X-API-Key header on every request.

nodes.name: BasicAuthInterceptor.kt
nodes.summary: OkHttp interceptor that attaches HTTP Basic auth credentials as an Authorization header on every request.

nodes.name: CollectionDtos.kt
nodes.summary: kotlinx.serialization DTOs for Komga collections and read-lists (read, create, update) plus a KomgaUserDto exposing roles for the write capability.

nodes.name: KomgaDtos.kt
nodes.summary: kotlinx.serialization DTOs for the core Komga REST shapes: the Spring Page envelope, series/book/metadata/media, read progress, pages, and libraries.

nodes.name: KomgaApi.kt
nodes.summary: Retrofit interface declaring the Komga REST v1 (and v2 users/me) endpoints for series, books, pages, thumbnails, read-progress, collections, and read-lists.
nodes.languageNotes: Retrofit suspend functions with @GET/@POST/@PATCH/@DELETE and @Streaming for binary page/file/thumbnail bytes; paths are relative to the .../api/v1/ base URL.

nodes.name: KomgaFormat.kt
nodes.summary: Pure mapping from a Komga mediaType string to the internal BookFormat enum (CBR/PDF/EPUB/CBZ) via prefix matching, defaulting unknown types to CBZ.

nodes.name: mediaTypeToFormat
nodes.summary: Prefix-matches a Komga mediaType string against known content types and returns the corresponding BookFormat, falling back to CBZ.

nodes.name: KomgaMapper.kt
nodes.summary: Pure mapper translating Komga DTOs into domain models (Series, Book, PageRef, ReadProgress, RemoteCollection), including reading-direction normalization, cover/page URL construction, and robust ISO-to-UTC timestamp parsing.

nodes.name: KomgaMapper
nodes.summary: Stateless mapper (holding sourceId and baseUrl) with pure toSeries/toBook/toPageRefs/toReadProgress/toRemoteCollection methods and a UTC-safe ISO timestamp parser.

nodes.name: parseIsoUtcMillis
nodes.summary: Parses a Komga timestamp to UTC epoch millis, trying Instant, OffsetDateTime, then zoneless LocalDateTime-as-UTC, returning 0 for blank/unparseable input.

nodes.name: KomgaSource.kt
nodes.summary: Concrete Komga backend behind the domain seams, implementing BrowsableSource/SyncingSource/ContainerSource/CollectionSyncSource over Retrofit, plus the KomgaSourceFactory that assembles the Retrofit client with API-key or Basic-auth interceptors.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements four source-api interfaces over a KomgaApi; streams whole-file downloads with progress callbacks and routes collection vs read-list endpoints by CollectionKind.

nodes.name: KomgaSource
nodes.summary: Komga MediaSource implementation covering browse/search/series detail/books/pages/cover/download, progress push-pull and read marking, and collection/read-list sync, delegating HTTP to KomgaApi and translation to KomgaMapper.

nodes.name: downloadFile
nodes.summary: Streams a whole book file from Komga in 64KB chunks into a byte buffer, reporting running (read, total) progress, with total -1 when no Content-Length is available.

nodes.name: ApiKeyInterceptorTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit test verifying the Komga API-key OkHttp interceptor injects the X-API-Key header on outgoing requests.

nodes.name: BasicAuthInterceptorTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit test verifying the basic-auth OkHttp interceptor adds the correct Authorization header for Komga requests.

nodes.name: KomgaCollectionSyncTest.kt
nodes.summary: MockWebServer test exercising the Komga source's collection sync behavior (listing, members, push/pull of collections).

nodes.name: KomgaDownloadTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit test that the Komga source downloads a book file and reports byte progress through the BrowsableSource seam.

nodes.name: KomgaE2ETest.kt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test driving the Komga source against a live local test-Komga instance to verify the full browse/read pipeline.

nodes.name: KomgaFormatTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit test for the Komga media-type to BookFormat mapping helper covering CBZ/CBR/PDF/EPUB and fallbacks.

nodes.name: KomgaMapperCollectionTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit test for the Komga collection-DTO mapper, asserting correct mapping of remote collections to the domain model including empty cases.

nodes.name: KomgaMapperTest.kt
nodes.summary: Comprehensive unit test for the Komga DTO-to-domain mapper covering series, books, metadata, progress and null/empty fallbacks.

nodes.name: KomgaSourceTest.kt
nodes.summary: MockWebServer contract test for KomgaSource covering browse, search, books, pages, openPage, progress push/pull and library listing.

nodes.name: build.gradle.kts
nodes.summary: Gradle build script for the source-opds module: pure-JVM Kotlin library depending on domain, source-api, coroutines and OkHttp.
nodes.languageNotes: Kotlin DSL build script using the version catalog (libs.*) and a JVM toolchain of 21.

nodes.name: OpdsFeedParser.kt

nodes.name: OpdsFormat.kt
nodes.summary: Maps an OPDS acquisition-link MIME type to the domain BookFormat enum, defaulting unknown types to CBZ.

nodes.name: OpdsModels.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the OpdsEntry data class representing a single Atom entry parsed from an OPDS feed.

nodes.name: OpdsSource.kt
nodes.summary: Concrete BrowsableSource implementation backing an OPDS Atom catalog over OkHttp, mapping entries to Series/Book and reading via file download.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements the source-agnostic seam (BrowsableSource); reading goes through downloadFile rather than page streaming, with optional basic-auth.

nodes.name: OpdsE2ETest.kt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test driving OpdsSource against a live OPDS endpoint to verify feed browsing and book download.

nodes.name: OpdsFeedParserTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit test for OpdsFeedParser verifying entry extraction, cover/acquisition link resolution and XXE-hardened parsing.

nodes.name: OpdsFormatTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit test for the OPDS MIME-type to BookFormat mapping helper including the CBZ fallback for unknown types.

nodes.name: OpdsSourceTest.kt
nodes.summary: MockWebServer contract test for OpdsSource covering browse, search, books, download, cover loading and series resolution.

nodes.summary: Icon code generator that reads Lucide SVGs, converts them to path data, and emits the LucideIcons.kt registry consumed by the ui-api module.
nodes.languageNotes: ESM script; the generated Kotlin object is written verbatim to ui-api so call sites never edit it by hand.

nodes.name: svg-to-pathdata.mjs
nodes.summary: Pure converter that turns SVG primitive elements (line, polyline, rect, circle, ellipse, path) into a single normalized SVG path-data string.

nodes.name: polyToPath
nodes.summary: Converts an SVG polyline/polygon's point list into a path-data move/line sequence, optionally closing the shape.

nodes.name: rectToPath
nodes.summary: Converts an SVG rect (including rounded corners) into equivalent path-data.

nodes.name: svgToPathData
nodes.summary: Top-level converter that scans an SVG string, dispatches each primitive element to its converter, and joins the results into one path-data string.

nodes.name: svg-to-pathdata.test.mjs
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the SVG-to-path-data converter, covering each primitive shape conversion.

nodes.summary: Packs a sequence of generated page images into a CBZ (zip) archive on disk.

nodes.name: make_fixtures.py
nodes.summary: Spike script that builds CBZ, PDF, and EPUB test fixtures with synthetic pages for exercising the MuPDF render path.

nodes.name: build.gradle.kts
nodes.summary: Gradle build script for the ui-api Android library module that holds the in-tree UI contracts (region slots, shell pack, theme pack, icon pack) and decoupled built-ins.
nodes.languageNotes: Enforces the domain -> ui-api -> app DAG via api(project(":domain")); not yet ABI-frozen pending the L1/L2 pack loader.

nodes.name: ShellDescriptor.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the ShellNavStyle vocabulary, the Compose-free ShellDescriptor data descriptor, and the pure descriptorFor(formFactor) resolution driving the declarative shell.
nodes.languageNotes: Compose-free, unit-testable; descriptorFor maps EXPANDED to BOTTOM_BAR and COMPACT to DRAWER, carrying the built-in choice as serializable data for the L2 external pack.

nodes.name: ShellPack.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the Shell-Pack seam contract: the ShellPack interface that arranges AppShellState pieces into a whole home skeleton, plus pure form-factor resolution from screen width with an optional user override.
nodes.languageNotes: Compose-free pure functions (formFactorFor/resolveFormFactor) kept separate from the @Composable ShellPack.Render so the resolution logic stays unit-testable.

nodes.name: DetailScaffoldState.kt
nodes.summary: Capability surface for the full-screen detail scaffold region: title, back, header actions, optional header search, optional snackbar host and the host-built body that a DetailSlot pack frames.

nodes.name: DialogState.kt
nodes.summary: Capability surface for the dialog region, mirroring the EinkModal parameters (title, confirm/dismiss callbacks and labels, optional header action, body) that a DialogSlot pack arranges.

nodes.name: ReaderOverlayState.kt
nodes.summary: Capability surface of the togglable reader chrome menu bar (title, navigation/shortcut callbacks, reader-specific actions); deliberately carries no visibility flag since chromeVisible and the E-Ink scrim are host-enforced.

nodes.name: ReaderTapZones.kt
nodes.summary: Declarative tap-zone descriptor for the reader region where geometry belongs to the host and the screen supplies only per-zone actions, plus a pure dispatch routing a normalized x-fraction to left/center/right thirds.
nodes.languageNotes: Sealed interface with a pure extension-function dispatch keeps the thirds geometry in one unit-testable place, replacing the prior opaque tapModifier.

nodes.name: TileState.kt
nodes.summary: Capability surface of the tiles region: the Series work, its local status and navigation callbacks; cover loading and the E-Ink filter stay host-enforced and outside the surface.

nodes.name: UiSlots.kt
nodes.summary: Core of the UI-slot seam: declares all eight chrome region slot type-aliases (header, homeHeader, dialog, settings, tiles, overlay, detail, readerChrome), the UiSlotPack/ResolvedSlots contracts, and the pure UiSlots.resolve fallback logic.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of @Composable function type-aliases as slot contracts; the pure resolve passes references through unchanged so referential identity is the unit-test invariant.

nodes.name: AuroraPack.kt
nodes.summary: Defines AuroraPack, the modern-mobile LCD-class UiPack (Slate/Deeper-Grey palette with a Cobalt accent, soft large radii, shadow depth, motion allowed) selected in smartphone mode.

nodes.name: DepthSurface.kt
nodes.summary: Provides the depthSurface Composable Modifier that renders depth device-class correctly: shadow elevation on LCD versus a hairline border on E-Ink, driven by DesignTokens.usesShadows.

nodes.name: DesignTokens.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the per-device-class skin tokens (accent, shadow usage, elevation, corner radius) and the pure designTokensFor mapping from DisplayBehavior across mono/Kaleido/LCD classes.
nodes.languageNotes: Two orthogonal DisplayBehavior axes (motion, accent) collapse via a when-expression; the nonsensical (motion, !accent) combo deliberately falls back to the mono branch.

nodes.name: EinkTokens.kt
nodes.summary: Single source of truth for the Onyx E-Ink layout measurements (hairline/strong border widths, tile radius, paddings, gaps, nav icon size) so no magic dp values land in UI code.

nodes.name: UiPack.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the UiPack interface (full look of a device class: color scheme, design tokens, shapes, typography), its three built-in implementations (mono E-Ink, Kaleido, LCD) and the pure packFor device-class selector.
nodes.languageNotes: Built-in packs are anonymous object expressions implementing the UiPack interface; Material3 light/dark color schemes are defined as private vals shared across packs.

nodes.name: UiPackRegistry.kt
nodes.summary: Registry object enumerating the built-in UiPacks and resolving them by id or device behavior; the in-tree hook point where a future user/community-supplied pack would register.

nodes.name: IconPackTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the process-global icon-pack seam (ActiveIconPack.resolve): default-pack completeness over every IconKey, partial-pack fallback to default, and glyph override.

nodes.name: ShellDescriptorTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the shell descriptor resolution (descriptorFor) mapping form factor to the ShellNavStyle nav-arrangement vocabulary (EXPANDED to bottom bar, COMPACT to drawer).

nodes.name: ShellFormFactorTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the pure shell form-factor resolution: formFactorFor (width-based compact/expanded split at 600dp) and resolveFormFactor (with ShellLayoutMode user override).

nodes.name: ReaderTapZonesTest.kt
nodes.summary: Pure geometry tests of the declarative tap-zone dispatch (HorizontalThirds.dispatch) verifying left/center/right routing and the exact thirds boundary behavior, without Compose.

nodes.name: SlotFallbackTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the UI-slot resolution logic (UiSlots.resolve) covering all eight regions: a missing slot falls back to the default and a supplied slot overrides it, asserted by referential identity.

nodes.name: DesignTokensTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit tests for designTokensFor verifying the mono/Kaleido/LCD mappings against named accent constants, axis independence, and the safe mono fallback for the nonsensical (motion, !accent) combo.

nodes.name: UiPackTest.kt
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the UiPack selection and registry: packFor device-class mapping, mono fallback, per-pack design tokens and color schemes, and UiPackRegistry id/behavior resolution and enumeration.

nodes.name: UiSlots
nodes.summary: Resolver object for the slot seam: its pure resolve(pack, defaults) returns ResolvedSlots picking each region's pack slot or the host default, keeping referential identity intact for testing.

nodes.name: UiSlotPack
nodes.summary: A slot pack with one optional slot per chrome region (header, homeHeader, dialog, settings, tiles, overlay, detail, readerChrome); null means do not override that region. New regions are added additively.

nodes.name: ResolvedSlots
nodes.summary: Resolved slots where every region is guaranteed non-null (defaults filled in where the pack supplied nothing), consumed app-wide via the LocalResolvedSlots CompositionLocal.

nodes.name: header
nodes.summary: Backward-compatible header extension on ResolvedSlots that builds a search-less HeaderState and invokes headerSlot, keeping existing current.header(title, onBack){actions} call sites unchanged.

nodes.name: UiPack
nodes.summary: Interface for the full look of a device class: id, color scheme (light/dark), design tokens, shapes and typography. The first real contract of the modular UI theme seam, implemented by the built-in and future community packs.

nodes.name: packFor
nodes.summary: Pure selector mapping a DisplayBehavior to a built-in UiPack across the two orthogonal axes: mono E-Ink when no accent, Kaleido when no motion, Aurora otherwise; the nonsensical combo falls safely onto mono.

nodes.name: DesignTokens
nodes.summary: Immutable data class of skin tokens that vary by device class: accent, onAccent, usesShadows, cardElevation and cornerRadius. The single source of truth derived from DisplayBehavior.

nodes.name: designTokensFor
nodes.summary: Pure mapping from a DisplayBehavior to DesignTokens across the three device classes, branching on the two orthogonal axes with a safe mono fallback for the nonsensical (motion, !accent) combination.

nodes.name: AuroraPack
nodes.summary: The Aurora UiPack implementation: a modern-mobile LCD-class look with Cobalt accent, soft 16dp radii, shadow depth and the AuroraDark/AuroraLight color schemes and Aurora typography.

nodes.name: UiPackRegistry
nodes.summary: Registry object that enumerates the built-in UiPacks (all), resolves one by stable id (byId), and selects the active pack for a device behavior (forBehavior delegating to packFor).

nodes.name: depthSurface
nodes.summary: Composable Modifier extension that renders depth correctly per device class: shadow + clip + background on LCD, or clip + background + hairline border on E-Ink, driven by DesignTokens.usesShadows.

nodes.name: ShellPack
nodes.summary: Interface for a shell pack that arranges the AppShellState pieces into a complete home skeleton via a Composable Render; built-ins are Compose while external declarative packs reuse the same surface.

nodes.name: resolveFormFactor
nodes.summary: Pure resolution of the effective shell form factor honoring the ShellLayoutMode user override: AUTO derives from width via formFactorFor, COMPACT/EXPANDED force the choice.

nodes.name: ReaderTapZones
nodes.summary: Sealed interface describing the reader's declarative tap zones; the only geometry today is HorizontalThirds carrying a left/center/right action per zone, host-owned geometry, screen-owned actions.

nodes.name: dispatch
nodes.summary: Pure HorizontalThirds extension routing a normalized x-fraction to the matching zone action: below 1/3 left, above 2/3 right, otherwise center (boundaries themselves fall on center).

nodes.name: LocalDownloadSync.kt
nodes.summary: Mirrors the LOCAL device-folder source into the downloads table so local works carry the downloaded badge and read through the offline path; reconciles (upsert + prune stale rows) idempotently and prewarms covers off the sync path.
nodes.languageNotes: Wiring-layer @Singleton allowed to know the concrete LocalSource type (Seam A).

nodes.name: LocalDownloadSync
nodes.summary: @Singleton that reconciles the local-folder source into the downloads table and triggers background cover prewarm.

nodes.name: PluginCatalog.kt
nodes.summary: Single holder of plugin-discovery state: scans installed source/preset/data plugin APKs locally, fetches/merges remote repo indexes, computes install state, prunes orphaned profiles, registers fonts, and installs fingerprint-verified plugins.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy StateFlow-backed state container; license-gated font extraction and ABI-range install checks.

nodes.name: PluginCatalog
nodes.summary: @Singleton exposing discovered-plugin StateFlows and the scanLocal/fetchRepos/install lifecycle for sources, color presets, languages, reader presets, UI packs, fonts, and panel models.

nodes.name: installedEntriesOf
nodes.summary: Pure mapping of discovered source/preset/data plugins onto the source-agnostic InstalledEntry view by plugin kind.

nodes.name: ReadingSessionTracker.kt
nodes.summary: Event-driven, capped-delta reading-time tracker (no ticking timer for E-Ink battery): samples time on enter/page/leave, clips idle deltas per reader kind, and flushes sessions on the application scope to survive reader teardown.
nodes.languageNotes: @Synchronized methods; overridable clock for testability.

nodes.name: ReadingSessionTracker
nodes.summary: @Singleton that accumulates capped per-page reading-time deltas and records ReadingSessions to the stats repository.

nodes.name: ScreenSaverManager.kt
nodes.summary: Installs an image as the Onyx device standby/screensaver via the EinkController seam: fits the source bitmap to the screen, publishes it into the shared MediaStore Pictures collection (world-readable), and hands the resolved path to the controller.
nodes.languageNotes: Works around Onyx uid/storage and dedupe constraints with unique MediaStore filenames; pure fitCentered helper is unit-testable.

nodes.name: ScreenSaverManager
nodes.summary: @Singleton that decodes, fits, publishes, and applies a screensaver image, caching the original bytes so it can re-fit on a fill/crop setting change.

nodes.name: fitCentered
nodes.summary: Pure (no Android types) aspect-fit/aspect-fill computation of a centered destination rectangle for an image within a target size.

nodes.name: SourceRegistration.kt
nodes.summary: Seam-A wiring class that builds and registers active sources (Komga/OPDS/Local/Plugin) from ServerConfigs into the SourceManager; concrete source types live only here, ViewModels see only BrowsableSource. Idempotent, atomic, churn-free sync.

nodes.name: SourceRegistration
nodes.summary: @Singleton that maps ServerConfig.kind to a concrete BrowsableSource factory and reconciles the SourceManager registry.

nodes.name: SyncCoordinator.kt
nodes.summary: The single place for sync/discovery decisions: call sites report only the event (app-start, server-changed, manual reload, tab-entered) and this latch-guarded coordinator decides what to sync/discover, delegating to CollectionSyncManager, PluginCatalog, LocalDownloadSync, and ExternalBookOpener.
nodes.languageNotes: Two constructors: a function-injected one for testing and a @Inject one wiring the real collaborators.

nodes.name: SyncCoordinator
nodes.summary: @Singleton central sync/discovery seam exposing onAppStart/onServerChanged/onManualReload/onPluginsTabResumed/onCollectionsTabEntered.

nodes.name: AppModule.kt
nodes.summary: Hilt SingletonComponent module providing the app's process-wide singletons: SourceManager (Seam A), seam-aware Coil ImageLoader, MuPDF/crengine document factories (Seam B), the application CoroutineScope, the PluginHost, and the Onyx-vs-NoOp EinkController.

nodes.name: NoOpEinkController.kt
nodes.summary: No-op EinkController fallback for non-Boox devices/emulator: forwards hardware-button events from the bus but performs no E-Ink control, so development never crashes off Boox hardware (Seam B).

nodes.name: NoOpEinkController
nodes.summary: Inert EinkController implementation exposing button events but no-op refresh/contrast/brightness/color operations.

nodes.name: VolumeKeyMapper.kt
nodes.summary: Pure mapping of a volume key code to a page-turn ButtonEvent (Volume Up = previous page, Volume Down = next page), returning null for unrelated keys.

nodes.name: volumeButtonEvent
nodes.summary: Maps KEYCODE_VOLUME_UP/DOWN to PAGE_PREV/PAGE_NEXT ButtonEvents.

nodes.name: MapBackedStrings.kt
nodes.summary: Runtime-override Strings implementation backed by a language-plugin override map with a built-in fallback (StringsEn), interpolating placeholders so a partial language plugin stays usable.
nodes.languageNotes: Generated from Strings.kt; every interface member is overridden so missing strings fail at compile time.

nodes.name: MapBackedStrings
nodes.summary: Strings implementation that reads each member from an override map, falling back to a built-in Strings and interpolating template placeholders.

nodes.name: Strings.kt
nodes.summary: The Strings interface declaring every user-visible UI text as a type-safe key, with each language providing an implementation (compile-time parity across languages).
nodes.languageNotes: Large type-safe i18n contract; compile-time enforcement of language completeness.

nodes.name: MainActivity.kt
nodes.summary: The single Activity entry point: sets the seam-aware Coil loader, enters fullscreen, wires volume-key page turns, hosts the Compose NavHost (home/series/group/reader/settings), applies UI-pack/theme/icon/strings, and drives the external 'open with' book flow.
nodes.languageNotes: @AndroidEntryPoint Activity; CompositionLocalProviders thread device behaviour, strings, color filter, and slot pack.

nodes.name: MainActivity
nodes.summary: ComponentActivity hosting the whole Compose nav graph and reader/settings routes, plus volume-key, fullscreen, and external-intent handling.

nodes.name: CollectionDetailScreen.kt

nodes.name: CollectionsViewModel.kt

nodes.name: CollectionsViewModel
nodes.summary: @HiltViewModel exposing collection lists, sync state, and create/rename/delete/member operations with last-write-wins server sync.

nodes.name: SyncSpin.kt

nodes.name: holdSpinning
nodes.summary: Holds a MutableStateFlow<Boolean> true while a block runs, but at least minMs, guaranteeing the true value is observed.

nodes.name: AnimatedAppIcon.kt

nodes.name: iconAnimationPlan
nodes.summary: Pure gating policy mapping (einkMode, animation) to a continuous-vs-bounded plan with a cycle duration.

nodes.name: BadgeDot.kt

nodes.name: freeText
nodes.summary: Creates a free-floating multi-line text element at an absolute position.

nodes.summary: Builds a hexagonal Excalidraw diamond/polygon element used to mark seam or pluggable nodes.

nodes.name: connect
nodes.summary: Computes anchor points between two elements and emits an arrow connector wiring them together.

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: Driver that assembles a named diagram from a builder callback, adds title/subtitle text, and writes the resulting Excalidraw JSON file to disk.

nodes.name: EinkController

nodes.summary: Pure per-axis merge of a user E-Ink override over a device default: a set override wins, an unset axis falls back to the device default.

nodes.name: BookmarkMarkerStyle.kt
nodes.summary: Enum of the three novel-bookmark draw styles (UNDERLINE, MARGIN, FLAG) shown on the page.

nodes.name: ReaderPreset.kt

nodes.summary: Data models for reading statistics: ReaderKind, a single ReadingSession, and the aggregated ReadingStats ready for display.

nodes.name: ScreenSaverMode.kt
nodes.summary: Enum of E-Ink device screensaver modes (OFF, CUSTOM, BOOK_COVER) controlling what the standby image shows.

nodes.name: Document.kt

nodes.name: Document
nodes.summary: Shared render abstraction over all formats: page count, page size, and page rendering with zoom/rotation.

nodes.name: ReflowableDocument

nodes.name: ReflowableDocumentFactory
nodes.summary: Opens reflowable novel documents behind Seam B, encapsulating the once-only engine bootstrap and runtime font registration.

nodes.name: HyphenationLanguages.kt

nodes.name: NovelSettings
nodes.summary: Engine- and UI-neutral novel typography settings with a pure toReflowConfig mapper and a companion of typography constants plus margin preset helpers.

nodes.name: DownloadRepository.kt

nodes.name: DownloadRepository
nodes.summary: Repository interface for offline downloads: observe the list, get/put/remove a book, and remove all books of a source.

nodes.name: NovelBookmarkRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Repository contract persisting local-only novel bookmarks with add/remove/rename plus single and batch marker-style and colour updates.

nodes.name: ReadingStatsRepository.kt

nodes.name: SeriesAutoTypeRepository.kt

nodes.name: SettingsRepository.kt
nodes.summary: App-wide settings contract exposing every preference (theme, language, display/shell mode, reader typography, E-Ink profiles, frontlight, screensaver, plugins) as UI-neutral Flows with matching suspend setters.

nodes.name: SettingsRepository
nodes.summary: Central settings interface with Flow getters and suspend setters for all app preferences, kept as primitive strings/numbers for UI neutrality.

nodes.name: ApplyReaderPreset.kt
